# crane-hire-cpcs-mcp

> CPCS / CISRS / NPORS card verification, BS 7121 lift plans, mobile crane / tower crane operator certification.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- verify_cpcs_card
- generate_lift_plan
- appointed_person_check
- crane_categories
- loler_thorough_examination

## Install
```
pip install crane-hire-cpcs-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/crane-hire-cpcs-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
